visCluster(
  obj,
  plot.type = "both",
  ht.col.list = list(
    col_range = c(-2, 0, 2)
  ),
  pseudotime_col = pseudotime_col,
  show_row_dend = FALSE,
  show_column_dend = FALSE,
  annoTerm.data = enrich,
  add.box = FALSE,
  add.line = TRUE,
  line.side = "left",
  go.col = go_col,
  add.bar = FALSE,
  panel.arg = c(2, 0.2, 4, "grey90", NA),
  term.text.limit = c(7, 10),
  word_wrap = TRUE,
  add_new_line = TRUE
)
